source: Item 17 table (pp 69-79) + Item 5/6/12 + HITS Agreement references + Spa Amendment references
note: Full clause-by-clause FA read from Exhibit D pp 127-182 not transcribed in this test run. Item 17 table provides the authoritative franchisor-prepared clause map. The below is the curated burden inventory derived from Item 17 plus Items 5, 6, 8, 11, 12.

grant_and_term.license_scope: non-exclusive right to use System at a specified location
grant_and_term.term_coo: remaining term of prior FA or as agreed

fee_and_payment_obligations.liquidated_damages: greater of Hotel's Avg Monthly Royalty or System's Avg Monthly Royalty, × remaining months

non_curable_grounds: insolvency/inability to pay debts/general assignment for benefit of creditors
bankruptcy petition voluntary or involuntary entered
loss of possession of hotel or hotel site
termination of other Your Hotel Agreements
interim_remedies_available: divert reservations to other Network Hotels

permitted_transfers_with_notice_consent_: >50% private equity accumulated since Effective Date

noncompete.in_term_scope: cannot own/license a competing hotel brand; minority Competitor interest OK sometimes; may be franchisee/manager of Competitor
noncompete.spa_concurrent: while operating eforea spa, no other spa in/adjacent to/associated with hotel

guaranty.note: Clause-level guaranty scope (personal/spousal/unlimited) not transcribed in this test run

insurance.content: Must maintain minimum levels/types per Manual. Must name additional insureds per Manual. Must carry endorsements and notice requirements per Manual.

indemnification.source: Item 17 transfer notice requirements reference indemnification for securities offerings and COO; full indemnification scope not transcribed

force_majeure.source: Item 17 §11 casualty; §13.2(6) 5-day closure exception for force majeure

distinctive_unusual_clauses: Re-licensing 'materially different terms' — explicit no-continuity-right language
Restricted Area Provision will NOT be extended for full FA term going forward (explicit forward-looking narrowing)
Noncompete across Hilton brand family (cross-brand) not protected — Embassy Suites franchisees can face intra-Hilton encroachment (HGI, DT, Homewood)
Liquidated damages formula uses greater of Hotel or System Avg Monthly Royalty × remaining months
Interim remedies allow Hilton to disable software and divert reservations BEFORE termination
HSM 18.5%/yr compounded daily on late payments (Item 5 Note 5)
All HFH assets pledged as collateral for Hilton parent debt (Note 7 to financials)
